## OfficeExternalReferenceExpandedSchema variable

Expanded schema for OfficeExternalReference with optional joined entities. Includes nested office and externalReference objects when loaded.

**Signature:**

```typescript
OfficeExternalReferenceExpandedSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		officeId: z.ZodString
		externalReferenceId: z.ZodString
	} & {
		office: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodLazy<z.ZodAny>>
		externalReference: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodLazy<z.ZodAny>>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		externalReferenceId: string
		officeId: string
		office?: any
		externalReference?: any
	},

		externalReferenceId: string
```
